target_host.description: The address of any server required by the task, formatted as hostname:\d{4} for port number.

runtime.description: Optional explicit runtime intent for local tooling. When omitted, runtime is inferred from target_host.

kind.description: Whether the runner should treat this as a local-code task or a live-server task.

install_command.description: Optional build/install command used by local-code workflows.

info.description: Optional task notes passed to the agent, such as credentials or setup hints.

invariant_thresholds.description: The thresholds for invariant checks, where the key is the name of the check and the value is the threshold.

^[a-zA-Z0-9_\\-]+$.description: The threshold for the invariant check with the given name.

invariant_test_paths.description: A list of unit test paths (directories and/or files) used in repo level check invariants.
